focus: Q9 optimal child-001 task ordering: SKILL.md first then batch by file-type

finding: SKILL.md is the dependency root for INSTALL_GUIDE version drift fix - SKILL.md version (1.0.3.1 at SKILL.md:5) is the source of truth for INSTALL_GUIDE line 49
References docs are standalone implementation references with no dependency on SKILL.md - code-graph-readiness-check.md has its own frontmatter and structure
mcp_server per-folder READMEs are package-level documentation independent of SKILL.md - they reference parent READMEs but don't depend on SKILL.md content
INSTALL_GUIDE has 6 drift issues: version (line 49), tool count (lines 56, 195), database path (lines 55, 110, 132, 210, 216) - only version drift depends on SKILL.md
Optimal ordering: SKILL.md hook first (dependency root), then batch by file-type (references HVR + mcp_server READMEs + INSTALL_GUIDE fixes) for parallelization
Batch-by-file-type ordering: (1) SKILL.md hook, (2) Batch A: References HVR (3 docs), (3) Batch B: mcp_server READMEs (8-10 docs), (4) Batch C: INSTALL_GUIDE drift fixes
